content: Illustrative MSCI-style issuer credit-analytics methodology summary used for reconciliation narration. This synthetic model weights Leverage at 40% and Interest Coverage at 30%, then applies a Sector/ESG overlay of about 30% that can move an assessment by one or more notches relative to a purely financial view. Because the overlay is heavy, this model can diverge from anchor providers even on identical fundamentals. When citing this methodology, agents may say 'per this MSCI-style model, leverage weight is 40% and a sector overlay of about 30% applies.'
disclaimer: Illustrative methodology summary — not MSCI data or official MSCI methodology.
